loop_count.reason: Zero-new-defects constraint targets finding quality, not loop convergence speed. May indirectly reduce loops by preventing re-audit cycles, but not guaranteed.

finding_regressions.reason: Zero-new-defects constraint requires pre/post diff and explicit regression check before commit. Directly targets the failure mode.

scope_violations.reason: Baseline already had 0 scope violations. Constraint applies but doesn't change this metric.

verified_clean_depth.reason: Shallow-evidence rejection constraint lists specific banned phrases and requires re-audit. Directly targets the failure mode.

promote_reason: 2 of 4 metrics Prevented + all 3 enforceability gates pass for both proposals
